intake.welcome: Hi. Describe your idea in 1-2 sentences. I'll ask a few clarifying questions and then start the research.
intake.q_target_user: Who is your target user? One sentence.
intake.q_geography: Which markets do you plan to launch in? (e.g. US, EU, Russia)
intake.q_monetization: How do you plan to monetize? (subscription / one-time / ads / B2B SaaS / other)
intake.q_references: Are there 1-3 similar products you'll compete with?
intake.q_already_tried: What have you tried already? (interviews, landing page, prototype — or nothing yet)
